translations.en: We are walking in the field.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đi bộ trên cánh đồng.
translations.hi: हम खेत में चल रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは野原を歩いています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject; colloquial for ‘we’, takes 3rd singular verb agreement.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with ‘On’.
Simple preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular, determinates ‘champ’.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the prepositional object of ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Tu vois ce champ derrière la ferme.
sentences.reading: /ty vwa sə ʃɑ̃ dɛʁjɛʁ la fɛʁm/

translations.fr: Tu vois ce champ derrière la ferme.
translations.ipa: /ty vwa sə ʃɑ̃ dɛʁjɛʁ la fɛʁm/
translations.en: Do you see that field behind the farm?
translations.es: ¿Ves ese campo detrás de la granja?
translations.de: Siehst du das Feld hinter dem Bauernhof?
translations.it: Vedi quel campo dietro la fattoria?
translations.ko: 농장 뒤에 있는 저 들판이 보이니?
translations.zh-Hans: 你看到农场后面的那片田了吗？
translations.yue: 你見到農場後面嗰片田嗎？
translations.ru: Ты видишь то поле за фермой?
translations.pt: Você vê aquele campo atrás da fazenda?
translations.he: אתה רואה את השדה ההוא מאחורי החווה?
translations.tr: Çiftliğin arkasındaki o tarlayı görüyor musun?
translations.vi: Bạn có thấy cánh đồng kia phía sau trang trại không?
translations.ar: هل ترى ذلك الحقل خلف المزرعة؟
translations.nl: Zie je dat veld achter de boerderij?
translations.uk: Ти бачиш те поле за фермою?
translations.hu: Látod azt a mezőt a tanya mögött?
translations.hi: क्या तुम्हें फार्म के पीछे वाला वह खेत दिख रहा है?
translations.el: Βλέπεις εκείνο το χωράφι πίσω από τη φάρμα;
translations.nb: Ser du det jordet bak gården?
translations.id: Apakah kamu melihat ladang itu di belakang peternakan?
translations.sv: Ser du det där fältet bakom gården?
translations.ro: Vezi câmpul acela din spatele fermei?
translations.da: Ser du marken der bag gården?
translations.ja: 農場の後ろにあるあの畑が見える？

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying ‘champ’.
Direct object of ‘vois’.
Preposition expressing location; heads the PP ‘derrière la ferme’.
Definite article, feminine singular, determinates ‘ferme’.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition ‘derrière’.

translations.en: I like picnicking near the field.
translations.es: Me gusta ir de picnic cerca del campo.
translations.de: Ich picknicke gern in der Nähe des Feldes.
translations.it: Mi piace fare un picnic vicino al campo.
translations.ko: 저는 들판 근처에서 소풍하는 것을 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢在田野旁边野餐。
translations.ru: Мне нравится устраивать пикник возле поля.
translations.pt: Gosto de fazer piquenique perto do campo.
translations.he: אני אוהב לעשות פיקניק ליד השדה.
translations.vi: Tôi thích đi dã ngoại gần cánh đồng.
translations.nl: Ik picknick graag vlak bij het veld.
translations.uk: Мені подобається влаштовувати пікнік біля поля.
translations.hi: मुझे खेत के पास पिकनिक करना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να κάνω πικνίκ κοντά στο χωράφι.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å ha piknik ved åkeren.
translations.id: Saya suka piknik di dekat ladang.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att ha picknick nära fältet.
translations.ro: Îmi place să fac picnic lângă câmp.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at holde picnic ved marken.
translations.ja: 私は畑の近くでピクニックをするのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘aime’.
Adverb forming the complex preposition ‘près de’ to mark proximity.
Contraction ‘de + le’; preposition completing ‘près’ (‘près du’ = near the).
Common noun; object of the preposition phrase ‘près du’.

sentences.target: Ils jouent au foot dans le champ.
sentences.reading: /il ʒu o fut dɑ̃ lə ʃɑ̃/

translations.fr: Ils jouent au foot dans le champ.
translations.ipa: /il ʒu o fut dɑ̃ lə ʃɑ̃/
translations.en: They’re playing soccer in the field.
translations.es: Están jugando al fútbol en el campo.
translations.de: Sie spielen Fußball auf dem Feld.
translations.it: Stanno giocando a calcio nel campo.
translations.ru: Они играют в футбол на поле.
translations.pt: Eles estão jogando futebol no campo.
translations.vi: Họ đang chơi bóng đá trên cánh đồng.
translations.ar: إنهم يلعبون كرة القدم في الحقل.
translations.nl: Ze spelen voetbal op het veld.
translations.uk: Вони грають у футбол на полі.
translations.hi: वे खेत में फुटबॉल खेल रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Grają w piłkę nożną na polu.
translations.id: Mereka sedang bermain sepak bola di ladang.
translations.ja: 彼らは野原でサッカーをしています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural personal pronoun; subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural, agreeing with ‘Ils’.
Contraction ‘à + le’; preposition introducing the sport/activity.
Common noun (colloquial for football/soccer); complement of the preposition ‘au’.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘dans’.
